archive_data.question_text: As per the Union Budget 2020-21, TDS at the rate of ______ is levied on e-commerce transactions.

explanation.english: As per the Union Budget 2020-21, Section 194-O imposes Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) at the rate of 1% on e-commerce transactions.
explanation.tanglish: Union Budget 2020-21 prakāram, e-commerce vilāpāṅkaḷukku 1% TDS vāsikkiṉṟatu Sektion 194-O paṭi.

archive_data.question_text: 'Akela' is a fictional character in the children's story book ______.

explanation.english: Akela is a fictional wolf character and the leader of the Seeonee wolf pack in Rudyard Kipling's 'The Jungle Book'.
explanation.tanglish: Rudyard Kipling eḻutiya 'The Jungle Book' Nōlil Akela oru kalpanāna vēṟṟuṛṛu paṭṭathā matṟum Seeonee vēṟṟuṛṛu kūṭṭathin thalaivar.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years was the Family Courts Act enacted?

explanation.english: The Family Courts Act was enacted in 1984 to promote reconciliation and secure speedy settlement of disputes relating to marriage and family affairs.
explanation.tanglish: Kulappa natanāka varum pāṭṭukaḷai varuttukkāṇum pōṭṭum pōṟuttuṟaik kaḷaṅkaḷai vekuvīkkavum 1984-il Family Courts Act enum seṭṭaṅ valangapattathu.

archive_data.question_text: The ______ in Punjab is held to commemorate the warriors who laid down their lives in the battle between Guru Gobind Singh and the Mughals.

explanation.english: Hola Mohalla is celebrated at Anandpur Sahib in Punjab to commemorate the warriors who fought in the battles between Guru Gobind Singh and the Mughal forces.
explanation.tanglish: Guru Gobind Singh matrum Mughal senaigalukku idaiyilāṇa yuddathil pōṟāṭiya yōdharkaḷai poṟuththaadugiṟkum Hola Mohalla uthsavam Paṅjāb-ilē Anandpur Sahib-il katappattathu.

archive_data.question_text: The Rohtas Fort is located in present day ______.

explanation.english: Rohtas Fort is located near the city of Jhelum in present-day Punjab, Pakistan. It was built by Sher Shah Suri in the 16th century.
explanation.tanglish: Rohtas kōṭṭai ippōṭu pakisthan-iliruntu Jhelum nagarathin arukil amaṅdhuḷḷathu. Idhai 16-ām nooṟṟāattil Sher Shah Suri kaṭṭiṉāṛ.

archive_data.question_text: By which Constitutional Amendment Act, the voting age of Indian citizens has been reduced from 21 years to 18 years?

explanation.english: The Constitution (Sixty-first Amendment) Act, 1988 reduced the voting age from 21 to 18 years by amending Article 326 of the Indian Constitution.
explanation.tanglish: Arasiyalamaippu (āṟṟupattu onṟāṟ) thīrttuppāṭṭu 1988, matuppaṭi 21-il iruntu 18-āka kuraikka pattathu, India arasiyalamaippin Article 326-ai maatram seidhu.

archive_data.question_text: The Census of India 2011 was the ______ national census after Independence.

explanation.english: The Census of India 2011 was the seventh national census conducted after Independence in 1947, with previous censuses in 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991, and 2001.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 India Ṣensus, Sudhandhiram adaintha 1947 pin 7-āvatu ṭesṭaṭṣ-āka nadatha pattathu. Munṉāṟa ṭesṭaṭṣ-kaḷ 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991 matrum 2001-il nadathapattana.

archive_data.question_text: Who was the head coach of the Mumbai Indians IPL cricket team in 2019?

explanation.english: Mahela Jayawardene served as the head coach of the Mumbai Indians IPL cricket team in 2019.
explanation.tanglish: Mahela Jayawardene 2019-il Mumbai Indians IPL kirukett kulu thalaivar coach-āga paṇṭai worethār.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is INCORRECT?

options.text: Proteins help build and repair tissues in the human body.
Extra fat in the human body is stored under the skin.
Deficiency of iodine in the human body causes anaemia.
The human body needs minerals in small quantities.

explanation.english: Iodine deficiency causes goitre (thyroid enlargement), not anaemia. Anaemia is caused by iron deficiency.
explanation.tanglish: Iyodaiṉ kuraivu kītṟuṟaiyai (thyroid uṟumālai) uṟuvaḷikkiṉṭatu, raththa hīṉam aṟiyādhu. Raththa hīṉam iṟumpu kuraivāl uṟuvāgum.

archive_data.question_text: A football stadium named after Bhaichung Bhutia has been built near his birthplace in ______.

explanation.english: Bhaichung Bhutia is from Sikkim, and a football stadium named after him has been built near his birthplace in Namchi, Sikkim.
explanation.tanglish: Bhaichung Bhutia Sikkim-iliruntu varugirār, avar pirantha Sikkim uḷḷa Namchi idathin arukilē oru kālāṭṭu maṭṭaiyōṟṟu avar peyaril nāmaṟaikkappaṭṭuḷḷathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following organisations/agencies does NOT operate a 'Payment Bank' in India as of August 2020?

explanation.english: As of August 2020, Wipro does not operate a Payments Bank. Fino, India Post, and Jio Payments Bank are operational in India.
explanation.tanglish: 2020 Āgaṣṭ mādhattukku Wipro oru peymeṉṭs bāṅk-ai nadathavillai. Fino, India Post matrum Jio India-il peymeṉṭs bāṅk-kaḷai nadathukiṉṭṟaṉa.
